notes: v0.3.73: ASIO enumeration fix. Preview‚Üíconnect transition was firing before the ASIO driver fully released the device, so connect saw 'found 0 devices'. stop_preview now waits 250ms for driver settling, AND start_session retries ASIO enumeration up to 5x with 250ms delays. Error message clarifies the WASAPI fallback if all retries still fail.
